candidate_check.description: OL 9 must require users to provide a password for privilege escalation.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify OL 9 requires users to provide a password for privilege escalation.

Verify "/etc/sudoers" has no occurrences of "NOPASSWD" with the following command:

$ sudo grep -iR nopasswd /etc/sudoers /etc/sudoers.d/

If any occurrences of "NOPASSWD" are returned from the command and have not been documented with the information system security officer (ISSO) as an organizationally defined administrative group using multifactor authentication (MFA), this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Configure OL 9 to not allow users to execute privileged actions without authenticating with a password.

Remove any occurrence of "NOPASSWD" found in "/etc/sudoers" file or files in the "/etc/sudoers.d" directory.

$ sudo sed -i '/NOPASSWD/ s/^/# /g' /etc/sudoers /etc/sudoers.d/*
title: OL 9 must require users to provide a password for privilege escalation.
